name: black pepper
summary: It should be framed specifically around piperine and digestive relevance rather than as a stand-alone tonic.

mechanismTags: piperine modulation of CYP3A4/CYP2C9/CYP2D6 and P-gp
interactions: May increase exposure of CYP/P-gp substrates and enhance curcumin or other supplement bioavailability
